_notes: African Union membership includes 55 states. Western Sahara / Sahrawi Arab Democratic Republic is a full AU member but is not represented as a separate state in the atlas (it is shown as part of Morocco's claim in most TopoJSON datasets). This layer therefore lists the 54 internationally widely-recognized state members. Morocco rejoined the AU in 2017 after a 33-year absence.
name: African Union
mission: Continental union of 55 African states, succeeding the Organisation of African Unity. Aims at deeper political and economic integration, conflict resolution, and a unified voice for Africa internationally.
